name: multi-field-overlay-sub-brick-preview-interval
description: Multi-Field scene with subBrickPreview='interval' overlay enabled. Wireframe-only 2×2×2 dashed grid drawn inside cells that WOULD be subdivided under the 'interval' trigger — uses the same shouldSubdivide(...) predicate the allocator uses, so this preview is a faithful 'what if' of sub-brick refinement before committing to the full atlas rebake. Toggle cycles through ['off' → 'interval' → 'adf' → 'curvature']; one toggle from the default 'off' lands on 'interval'.
